title: Remove Ikku name from third page

requirements.text: Remove the text 'Ikku' from the page title in frontend/index.html, changing it from 'Ikku ❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' to '❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz'

quotes: jo third page h jisme ikku naam likha hua h usko hata do

acceptanceCriteria: The HTML title tag no longer contains 'Ikku'
The heart emoji and 'Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' text remain intact

requirements.text: Remove the text 'Ikku' from the IntroScreen component title in frontend/src/components/IntroScreen.tsx, changing the heading from 'Ikku ❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' to '❤️ Ek Chhota Sa Quiz'

quotes: jo third page h jisme ikku naam likha hua h usko hata do

acceptanceCriteria: The h1 heading in IntroScreen no longer displays 'Ikku'
The heart emoji and 'Ek Chhota Sa Quiz' text remain visible
The layout and styling remain consistent

constraints: Preserve all other text content, styling, and functionality
Maintain the romantic theme and visual design
nonGoals: Changing any quiz questions or answers
Modifying the password or authentication flow
Altering the reveal screen or shayari content
